# PERF-156 negative: range by index on a string skips UTF-8 decoding
lang: go
file: PERF-156-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "fmt"

func ByteLengths(strs []string) []int {
	out := make([]int, 0, len(strs))
	for i := range strs {
		out = append(out, i)
	}
	return out
}

func _() {
	fmt.Println(ByteLengths([]string{"a", "bb", "ccc"}))
}
